creator: sunpoet@FreeBSD.org
text:
Since it's an old version of devel/pecl-threads (which was in the ports tree), we should not add it as a new port. The correct steps are:
- Repocopy previous version of devel/pecl-pthreads to devel/pecl-pthreads2
- Make proper changes
- Add pecl-pthreads2 to devel/Makefile
